reviewDetails.text: This is the real deal. Every time I open a bottle of Dulanovic Plum, it instantly reminds me of home. A true champion among brandies.
As someone who appreciates premium Balkan spirits, I can safely say nothing beats a glass of Dulanovic Golden Quince after a good meal. Absolutely world-class.
I serve Dulanovic Pear to all my friends and teammates in Denver. The wooden crate packaging is pure perfection. They love it!
Finally, a fruit brandy with depth, character, and an incredible finish. The oak barrel aging process here is executed brilliantly. Highly recommended.
The Dulanovic Quince is my absolute go-to gift for international singers and actors. It perfectly captures our tradition in a premium bottle.
